outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed volatility expected due to strong positive GEX in front expiries, but extreme bearish skew and high PCR indicate a high risk of a sharp directional break lower if support fails.
outlook.summary: The market is pinned precisely at the 0DTE Gamma Flip (713.69), creating an inflection point. Massive positive GEX in 0DTE and Weekly expiries suppresses immediate volatility, but extremely high Put/Call ratios (>2.7) and a bearish 'smirk' skew reveal heavy institutional downside hedging. The 715 strike acts as an immediate Call Wall with explosive volume, while structural support rests at 700.

Weekly Max Pain level combined with high Put OI, acting as a strong gravitational anchor for the front expiries.

outlook.summary: The market exhibits a highly positive aggregate GEX across all expirations, indicating that dealers are heavily long gamma. This suppresses broad volatility and favors localized mean-reversion. High Put/Call ratios in short-term expiries reflect defensive hedging, but the massive Call open interest at lower bounds (26700) creates an absolute magnet, while structural Call ceilings cap upside progression.

levels.motivazione: Harmonic RESONANCE across all three expiries (0DTE, WEEKLY, MONTHLY) with dominant Call OI and massive intraday volume capping the upside.

Significant CONFLUENCE level in 0DTE and WEEKLY expirations with solid Call OI defining the upper boundary of the structural range.
Exceptional Monthly Call OI (3759) acts as a massive gravitational pull for dealer hedging, pinning prices and establishing a structural floor.
Multi-expiry CONFLUENCE with heavy Put OI accumulation and extreme 0DTE volume indicating strong institutional interest and defensive support.
Monthly Gamma Flip level marking the critical structural threshold separating positive and negative gamma regimes.
